They’re often made of a thinner, more flexible plastic, maybe like a sealant. On the other hand, ice trays are the containers you use to make ice cubes. They’re typically made of more rigid plastic, maybe thicker, so they can hold the shape of the ice and withstand freezing temperatures.

Now, the size mentioned is 2 cm by 10 cm. A strip of that size could be cut from either. But the question is about the material.
